title: Grilled Irish Skewers with Tomato Sauce
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring Irish lamb skewers grilled to perfection and served with a rich tomato sauce made from passata.

ingredients.name: skewers
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for 30 minutes before grilling

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince and mix with olive oil

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Soak the skewers in water for 30 minutes before grilling.
Thread the lamb cubes onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through.
Heat the passata in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic to the passata and stir to combine.
Simmer the sauce for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the grilled skewers with the tomato sauce spooned over the top.
